commands: export DATABASE_URL=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /staye/prod/DATABASE_URL --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text)

docker run --rm -e DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL 684480407183.dkr.ecr.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/staye-backend:latest /bin/sh -c "echo \"UPDATE "User" SET "plainTextPassword" = 'Password@123' WHERE "plainTextPassword" IS NULL;\" | npx prisma db execute --stdin"
